# Coding Conventions

> **Source of truth:** [`docs/development/conventions/`](../../../docs/development/conventions/)

| Scope | Convention File |
|-------|-----------------|
| C++ (general) | [`cpp.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/cpp.md) |
| Layered Architecture | [`architecture.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/architecture.md) |
| Naming | [`naming.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/naming.md) |
| Error Handling (`Result<T>`) | [`error-handling.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/error-handling.md) |
| Threading & synchronisation | [`threading.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/threading.md) |
| Logging (`LOG_*` macros) | [`logging.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/logging.md) |
| Testing (zero-dep harness) | [`testing.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/testing.md) |
| Performance (hot-path rules) | [`performance.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/performance.md) |
| Configuration (YAML + loader) | [`configuration.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/configuration.md) |
| Inference adapters (ONNX/TRT) | [`inference.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/inference.md) |
| Transport / AlertPublisher | [`transport.md`](../../../docs/development/conventions/transport.md) |

When multiple conventions apply, follow the stricter rule.
